## Checklist
- [ ] PR passes all CI gates (lint, typecheck, tests, bundle size).
- [ ] Unit test coverage >= 90% (line) and >= 85% (branch) maintained.
- [ ] No Phase 2+ code paths enabled without feature flags.
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to `en.json` (no hardcoded strings).
- [ ] Async operations handle timeouts and cancellation tokens.
